_metadata.title: Indonesian Prescription Drug Database - Fornas-based
_metadata.description: Comprehensive catalog of ~394 generic drugs from Formularium Nasional KMK 2197/2023 with OKT eligibility auto-derivation
_metadata.disclaimer: This information is for reference, education, and workflow support only.

primary_law.name: Undang-Undang Nomor 17 Tahun 2023 tentang Kesehatan
primary_law.description: Primary health law; classifies drugs into prescription and non-prescription categories

implementing_regulation.name: Peraturan Pemerintah Nomor 28 Tahun 2024
key_articles: 922(2) Three pillars: self-medication, chronic refill, topical
implementing_regulation.description: Detailed rules for drug classification and OKT dispensing by pharmacists
